name: @calma/otel
description: Emit a Calma verdict as a standard OpenTelemetry GenAI evaluation result — the TypeScript half of the OTel-eval distribution wedge. Drop-in deterministic eval source for Braintrust / LangSmith / Langfuse / Phoenix.
_note: src ships as TypeScript (Node >=22.6 strips types; bundlers handle .ts). A tsc build to dist/ (ESM+CJS+.d.ts) for older consumers + npm publish is a follow-up.
